project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

assets.name: raptor_scavenger
assets.description: mutated velociraptor scavenger with scarred scales, torn harness made of scrap metal, one cybernetic glowing green eye, sharp claws

assets.name: raptor_scavenger_idle
assets.action: subtle idle breathing animation, slight chest rise and fall, tail sway, head micro-movements, standing in place, loopable, side view facing right
